'''hatoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackship|crackship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackship|crackship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hatoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hætereth|hætereth]] || [[word:hæterej|hæterej]] || [[word:hæteresh|hæteresh]] || [[word:hætere|hætere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hatotoroth|hatotoroth]] || [[word:hatotoroj|hatotoroj]] || [[word:hatotorosh|hatotorosh]] || [[word:hatotoro|hatotoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hatoroth|hatoroth]] || [[word:hatoroj|hatoroj]] || [[word:hatorosh|hatorosh]] || [[word:hatoro|hatoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hatofroth|hatofroth]] || [[word:hatofroj|hatofroj]] || [[word:hatofrosh|hatofrosh]] || [[word:hatofrof|hatofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hatorotho|hatorotho]] || [[word:hatorojo|hatorojo]] || [[word:hatorosho|hatorosho]] || [[word:hatoroko|hatoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hatoroth|hatoroth]] || [[word:hatoroj|hatoroj]] || [[word:hatorosh|hatorosh]] || [[word:hatoro|hatoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hatorothol|hatorothol]] || [[word:hatorojol|hatorojol]] || [[word:hatoroshol|hatoroshol]] || [[word:hatorokol|hatorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hatorothotho|hatorothotho]] || [[word:hatorojojo|hatorojojo]] || [[word:hatoroshosho|hatoroshosho]] || [[word:hatoroko|hatoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hatorothon|hatorothon]] || [[word:hatorojon|hatorojon]] || [[word:hatoroshon|hatoroshon]] || [[word:hatorokon|hatorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hatorothoro|hatorothoro]] || [[word:hatorojoro|hatorojoro]] || [[word:hatoroshoro|hatoroshoro]] || [[word:hatorokoro|hatorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
